Plugin.Name: UnraidClaw
Plugin.Description: AI Agent Gateway for Unraid. Permission-enforcing REST API that lets AI agents manage your server.[br][br] Combines Unraid's GraphQL API with direct system integration for Docker, VMs, Array, Shares, System, Notifications, Network, and Logs.[br][br] Features:[br] - 43 tools across 11 categories (Docker, VMs, Array, Shares, System, etc.)[br] - Full resource:action permission matrix configurable from WebGUI[br] - HTTPS with auto-generated TLS certificate[br] - SHA-256 API key authentication[br] - Activity logging with filter and search[br] - OpenClaw plugin available on npm (openclaw plugins install unraidclaw)[br][br] Requires Unraid 7.0.0 or later (Node.js 22+ built-in).
